/usr/bin/c++ -w -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wall -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_opt_config.dir/src/tests/optimizations/test_opt_config.cpp.o -o test_opt_config  libsparse_tensor_core.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgtest.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgtest_main.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libgtest.a
